summary: Frontend-only testing of /database page redesign (table + drawer, no pipeline). All 16 acceptance items verified end-to-end as CEO (admin@servall.com).

minor.issue: Returns 404 when opening employee drawer (drawer uses lead documents endpoint for employees). Frontend catches error so no UI break, but console shows 404. Consider using /documents/employee/{id} or guarding the call.

issues: Radix warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent/SheetContent' — accessibility nit. Add <DialogDescription>/aria-describedby for compliance.

action_items: (Optional) Replace /documents/lead/{id} call in EmployeeDetailDrawer with the correct employee documents endpoint (or hide Documents tab if not implemented) to eliminate 404 console error.
(Optional) Add DialogDescription/SheetDescription for a11y to silence Radix warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: DatabasePage.js is ~925 lines — consider extracting EmployeeDetailDrawer into its own file (>700 line guideline).
Documents tab in drawer relies on /documents/lead/{id} which is a leads endpoint reused for employees — semantically incorrect; will silently always be empty for employees.
audit GET call is fired even when isSuper=false branch uses Promise.resolve() — OK; but for non-CEO users isSuper check inside Audit tab correctly shows the 'CEO only' message.
Form 'email' input in Add Employee dialog lacks a data-testid (only name/phone/type/code have testids). Add data-testid='emp-email-input' for consistency.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 employees via UI: TEST_Alice HO (head_office), TEST_Bob FR (franchise), TEST_Carol HO (head_office). Each got auto employee_code (EMP0008-EMP0010). One was moved to Hold then Joined for testing. One note ('TEST note from automation') was added.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All DatabasePage redesign acceptance criteria pass. Verified: no stage-tab-* / no employee-card-* testids present, employee-table renders with all 16 columns (Name, Mobile, Email, Type, Stage, Designation, Department, Branch ID, City, Area, Joining, Salary, Code, Status, Created, Actions). All 5 top-bar testids exist (template/import/import-input/export/create). All 6 counter testids and all 8 filter testids exist. Inline row-move-stage Hold opens row-stage-reason-textarea + row-confirm-stage-move dialog; Joined transitions immediately. Drawer opens via view-employee-{id} eye icon, header shows name + EMP code + TypeBadge + StageBadge, has all 7 tabs (Basic, Employment, Salary, Stage History, Audit Log, Documents, Notes). drawer-move-stage-select + drawer-stage-reason + drawer-confirm-stage work. drawer-edit-button toggles edit mode and drawer-save-button appears. drawer-note-textarea + drawer-add-note-button add notes that appear with author + timestamp. Excel template + export downloads .xlsx files successfully (verified via Playwright expect_download). Filters (Type=Franchise) and live search both narrow the row count correctly. Audit tab shows entries for CEO (length > 0). Only concern: /documents/lead/{employee_id} returns 404 (logged in console, swallowed by .catch).
rca of the issue: No blocking issues. The 404 on /documents/lead/{id} occurs because EmployeeDetailDrawer reuses a leads endpoint to fetch documents for an employee — endpoint either doesn't exist for employees or expects lead_id. Mitigation: switch to correct employee-documents endpoint or remove/hide the Documents tab until backend supports it. Frontend already gracefully degrades (empty list shown, toast not raised).
